Description: Construction Survey Plan Preparation and Approval
SourceSection: Step A3 — Prepare Construction Survey Plan
Notes: Develop written plan: control network config; methodology; accuracy targets; phasing for geotech-dependent foundation; re-staking provisions. Includes review/approval by Design-Builder/CM per REQ-008-03-06a

Description: Retrieve and Verify Preliminary Survey Control Data
SourceSection: Steps A1-A2 — Retrieve and Verify Control
Notes: Obtain control data from DEL-008-02; perform closure check on min 2 points; document chain-of-custody per REQ-008-03-08b; re-establish disturbed points if needed

SourceSection: Step A4 — Establish and Protect Permanent Control Monuments
Notes: Min 2 permanent monuments on stable ground outside construction disturbance zone; photo documentation; coordinate records

Description: Building Footprint and Foundation Layout Staking
SourceSection: Step B3 — Stake Building Footprint and Foundation Extents
Notes: Stake building corners; column grid; foundation excavation limits. Includes hold-point gate for final foundation form staking pending confirmed IFC drawings

Description: Service Pit / Trench Layout and Grade Staking
SourceSection: Step B4 — Stake Service Pit / Trench
Notes: Below-grade element: position; width; length; invert grade control stakes per IFC structural drawings

Description: Cistern and Mud Sump Layout Staking
SourceSection: Step B5 — Stake Cistern and Mud Sump Locations
Notes: 50000 L cistern location and invert grades; exterior mud sump position and grade per plumbing/civil IFC

Description: Subgrade Grade Control for Driving Surfaces
SourceSection: Step B6 — Establish Subgrade Grade Control
Notes: Grade stakes/offset hubs for all driving surface areas subject to topsoil stripping and gravel surfacing; consistent with PKG-005 civil grading design

SourceSection: Step B7 — Stake Utility Corridors
Notes: Natural gas; electrical service; communications tie-in corridor locations per applicable IFC drawings

Description: Cement Pads and Septic Tank Staking
SourceSection: Step B8 — Stake Cement Pads and Septic Tank
Notes: Cement pad positions per Appendix B layout; 2000 US gal septic holding tank location per IFC

SourceSection: Step B2 — Establish Site Grid / Building Control
Notes: Establish building control line system aligned with building axes from permanent control monuments; record offsets and tie distances

SourceSection: Step C1 — Foundation Excavation Verification
Notes: Post-excavation pre-forming survey: compare excavated elevations and extents to IFC; discrepancy reporting

SourceSection: Step C2 — Foundation Form Verification
Notes: Pre-concrete-pour form check: survey form tops and reference points; confirm within tolerance

Description: Slab-on-Grade Grade Control and Drainage Slope Verification
SourceSection: Steps C3-C3a — Slab Grade Control and Drainage Slope Verification
Notes: Grade references for slab pour; explicit drainage slope verification (direction and gradient vs civil design) per REQ-008-03-04

SourceSection: Step C4 — Steel Plate Embedment Layout
Notes: Confirm positions of steel plate embedments in concrete floor for heavy tracked/packer equipment before slab pour

SourceSection: Step C5 — Subgrade Verification
Notes: Post-topsoil-stripping subgrade elevation survey before gravel placement; compare to civil design grades

SourceSection: Step C6 — Progress Surveys
Notes: Periodic progress surveys at intervals per Construction Survey Plan; document status of completed work positions vs IFC. Frequency TBD

SourceSection: Step C7 — Notify County of Inspection Hold Points
Notes: Advance notification to County PM at survey-related inspection milestones; provide survey records after inspection per RFP §3.3.2

SourceSection: Step D1 — Compile Field Documentation Package
Notes: Assemble all field notes; staking records; grade sheets; verification records; progress surveys into organized package per REQ-008-03-08

SourceSection: Step D2 — Prepare Construction Survey Summary Report
Notes: Summary report if required by CM or County: work performed; control network; elements staked; discrepancies

Description: Control Data Handoff to As-Built Survey
SourceSection: Step D3 — Control Data Handoff
Notes: Prepare and transfer control network handoff package to DEL-008-04; datum confirmation; chain-of-custody record completion per REQ-008-03-08b

SourceSection: Prerequisites — P-08 OH&S
Notes: Site-specific safety orientation; PPE; hazard review for active landfill site; emergency procedures per Prime Contractor framework

SourceSection: Steps A-D (overall coordination)
Notes: PM oversight of construction survey deliverable. Hours from Level_of_Effort.csv (R-01; 6 hr)

SourceSection: Steps A-D (estimate support)
Notes: Cost estimator support. Hours from Level_of_Effort.csv (R-08; 4 hr)
